depth.caption: The control lab now seeks into the local timestamped EBUS video for each depth step instead of simulating depth from a still image.

gain.caption: Gain controls select one of eight real EBUS gain clips at the current depth.

contrast.caption: Contrast controls select one of eight real EBUS contrast clips at the current depth.

color-doppler.caption: Flow preview uses the timestamped Color Flow, Power Flow, and H-flow clips at the active depth.

calipers.caption: Add a measured still frame to demonstrate correct caliper placement.

freeze.caption: Add a frozen teaching frame that highlights the inspection step before measurement.

save.caption: Add a final saved-frame example once a canonical teaching capture is available.
